---
title: "MonksHillLabs Initiative"
date: "2024-11-15"
categories: [infrastructure, collaboration, research platform]
description: "MonksHillLabs provides shared research infrastructure and collaborative workspace for developing and testing landscape modelling tools and data workflows."
---

MonksHillLabs is a collaborative research platform that provides shared computational
infrastructure, data repositories, and development environments for landscape and
land use modelling projects.

The initiative brings together researchers, data scientists, and software developers
to co-create tools, standards, and workflows that advance data interoperability and
reproducible research in landscape science.

Current activities include developing standardized data formats, building modular
modelling components, and hosting hackathons and training workshops.
